name: llm-judge detector runs against a real rule from the standards tree and emits a verdict
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/llm-judge.sh" --target "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/runner-go/internal/spec/spec.go" --rule g-ts-001 --dry-run 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -le 3 ] && grep -qE "dry-run|model=" err.txt && echo judge_runnable 1>&2
